---
name: New email source
about: Propose a new email discovery source
title: '[Source] '
labels: enhancement, new-source
assignees: ''
---

## Source name and URL

What service / dataset would this source use?

## What emails would it find?

Describe what kinds of emails this would discover (e.g. "PGP keyserver emails", "breach database emails", "LinkedIn profiles").

## API / access method

- Free or paid?
- Authentication required?
- Rate limits?
- Relevant docs URL:

## Example output

What would a result look like?

```
email: john@company.com
confidence: 25
source: new_source
context: "Found via XYZ database"
```

## Why is this better than existing sources?

How does this complement theHarvester, SpiderFoot, or web crawler?
